summary: Comprehensive testing of San Francisco city landing page (/san-francisco-appliance-repair) complete rewrite. All 15 sections verified successfully with correct Precision Craft design system implementation. Page loads without errors, all data-testid attributes present and functional, mobile responsive, all links working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All 15 sections properly implemented as standalone page (no longer using ApplianceRepairPageNew template)
Section 1 Hero (CityHeroNew): cityName='San Francisco', H1 correct, trust badges present (Licensed CA Technician, 4.9 Google, License #51001), CTA buttons working, stats row (10+, 180-Day, Same-Day)
Section 2 Intro: 'SAN FRANCISCO' eyebrow text, 3 paragraphs of unique SF content
Section 3 Neighborhoods: 24 neighborhood pills in flexbox wrap, ZIP codes displaying correctly
Section 4 Appliances: 8 appliance repair links in 2-column grid with correct hrefs
Section 5 Common Problems: Dark navy #0D1B2A background, 6 problem cards with orange left border
Section 6 Process: 4 steps (01-04) with large numbers and orange icons
Section 7 Pricing: $60 diagnostic, 180-day warranty, $0 hidden fees displayed correctly
Section 8 Availability: Hours display (Mon-Fri 8-6, Sat 8-3, Sun Closed), Call and Book CTAs
Section 9 Brands: 18 brand logo tiles with correct links to brand pages
Section 10 Housing Types: 4 cards (Victorian, High-Rise, Row Houses, Luxury) with neighborhoods
Section 11 Case Studies: 3 repair cards from cityLocalData (Sub-Zero, Bosch, Samsung)
Section 12 Testimonials: 3 reviews with star ratings on dark #0D1B2A background
Section 13 FAQ: 10 clickable accordion questions, expand/collapse working correctly with orange #FF5722 toggle icons
Section 14 Nearby: 13 city link pills plus 'All 22 Service Cities' link with correct hrefs
Section 15 Final CTA: Dark navy background with Call and Book buttons
Footer: FixitBay logo, phone (760) 543-5733 in orange, © 2026 copyright
Sticky Book Button: Appears after scrolling past 300px, positioned fixed bottom-right

success_rate.backend: N/A (static React SPA - frontend only test)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 verified complete San Francisco page rewrite with all 15 sections present. Key data-testid attributes: city-hero, city-trust-badges, city-cta-book, city-cta-call, sf-intro, sf-neighborhoods, sf-services, sf-problems, sf-process, sf-step-01/02/03/04, sf-pricing, sf-availability, sf-cta-call, sf-cta-book, sf-brands, sf-housing, sf-case-studies, sf-testimonials, sf-faq, sf-faq-q-0 through sf-faq-q-9, sf-nearby, sf-final-cta, sf-final-call, sf-final-book, sf-footer, sf-sticky-book. Test performed on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844) viewports. All sections render correctly on both viewports with proper responsive behavior. Page height on mobile: 14426px. LCP: 1176ms. CLS: 0.0007 (excellent).
